ddls:
CREATE TABLE "practice_areas" (
  "practice_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice area */,
  "practice_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the practice area (e.g., LULC, Food Security) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the practice area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the practice area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the practice area */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the practice area */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the practice area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_areas_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research data entry */,
  "practice_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the practice area to which the data belongs */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of research documents or datasets in the practice area */,
  "full_text_count" INTEGER /* Number of full-text documents available */,
  "ml_performance_count" INTEGER /* Number of documents enhanced with machine learning performance metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last review of the data */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field collection, satellite imagery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_data_practice_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_area_id") REFERENCES practice_areas ("practice_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research document */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research data entry to which the document belongs */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the document */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "is_full_text" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the document is available in full text */,
  "has_ml_performance" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the document includes machine learning performance metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the document */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last review of the document */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been cited */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the document for better searchability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_documents_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES research_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_documents_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collab_members" (
  "collab_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration member */,
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_in_collab" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collab_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collab_members_collab_id FOREIGN KEY ("collab_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ml_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ML model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the ML model */,
  "practice_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the practice area the model is used in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ml_models_practice_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_area_id") REFERENCES practice_areas ("practice_area_id")
)
